name: Cult Leader
description: A charismatic fanatic wreathed in dark energy. Their eyes burn with unholy fervor, and eldritch power crackles at their fingertips. Other cultists follow them without question.

attacks.name: Ceremonial Staff
attacks.description: A gnarled staff carved with blasphemous runes

attacks.name: Fireball
attacks.description: Unleashes a devastating burst of flame that consumes everything

attacks.name: Dark Bolt
attacks.description: A bolt of shadowy energy that chills the soul

attacks.name: Inflict Wounds
attacks.description: Channels dark energy through a touch of death

special_abilities.name: Dark Zealot
special_abilities.description: Inspires nearby cultists. Never flees from combat.

behavior.notes: Intelligent spellcaster. Will use Fireball even if it hits allies. Prefers staying at range 5-7 tiles. Uses Dark Bolt when conserving slots, Fireball for groups, Inflict Wounds if cornered.
